title: Repealed by Acts 1991, No. 686, 4, eff. Dec. 31, 1991; Redesignated from R.S. 33:6124.1 by Acts 1991, No. 74, 3, eff. June 25, 1991.
doc_html:
§1926.  Repealed by Acts 1991, No. 686, §4, eff. Dec. 31, 1991; Redesignated from R.S. 33:6124.1 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.  

{{NOTE:  SEE SEC. 3 OF ACT 686 OF 1991.}}
